title: UML Diagram
description: Schema representing a UML diagram definition, including its type, source text, and rendered output metadata.

description.description: Description of what the diagram represents

diagramType.description: The type of UML or other diagram

source.description: The plain-text source of the diagram (e.g., PlantUML or Mermaid syntax)

format.description: The markup language used for the diagram source

encodedSource.description: Deflate + base64url encoded version of the source for use with PlantUML/Kroki GET APIs

outputUrl.description: URL to the rendered diagram image (PNG, SVG, etc.)

outputFormat.description: The output format of the rendered diagram

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the diagram was created

modified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the diagram was last modified
